verdict_summary: HAR captured (6.5MB, 73 entries); SSE endpoint is POST https://duck.ai/duckchat/v1/chat (text/event-stream); HAR did not persist SSE body (Chrome limitation); SPA RENDERED warning text — possibly contradicting #880 FAIL_PROTOCOL premise.

evidence.request_critical_header: x-vqd-hash-1 (required, base64-encoded JSON of server_hashes — anti-bot)

notes: KEY FINDING: duck.ai SPA actually rendered a Korean warning text in chat panel: '⚠ 이 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다. 민감한 정보가 포함된 요청은 외부 AI 서비스로 전송할 수 없습니다.' This is exactly the APF block warning. Suggests current envelope IS rendering correctly in SPA — recommend re-verifying #880 FAIL_PROTOCOL classification before envelope iteration. Limitation: Chrome HAR export does NOT persist SSE response bodies — to get raw chunks for envelope template, must instrument fetch via Console JS or use mitmproxy. Request body uses durableStream.publicKey (RSA-OAEP-256) for E2E encryption of message stream — important for envelope replay strategy. Accept header: text/event-stream. Auth: x-vqd-hash-1 (server_hashes-based, rotated per request). User session was logged-in (cookies present).
